feature.name: WebSocket HTTP upgrade handshake parsing
feature.description: Extract websockets HTTP/1.1 handshake request parsing, header grammars (Connection, Upgrade, extensions, subprotocols), and handshake header validation without socket I/O or frame protocol.
included_behaviors: parse Connection and Upgrade header lists with OWS and empty elements
parse WebSocket handshake HTTP requests from byte streams
case-insensitive Headers lookup with multiple values per name
validate handshake request headers including Sec-WebSocket-Key and Version
raise typed errors for malformed headers and upgrade requests
excluded_behaviors: ServerProtocol and ClientProtocol connection state machines
CLI, docs, CI, and original tests
original websockets package import at runtime

entanglement.description: Handshake parsing couples RFC 7230/6455 header grammars, case-insensitive header storage, generator-based HTTP/1.1 line parsing, and upgrade validation rules.
signals: manual ABNF parsers in headers.py share list/OWS helpers
Headers preserves insertion order and duplicate header names
Request.parse uses generator coroutines over StreamReader buffers
upgrade validation composes parse_connection, parse_upgrade, and key checks
full websockets package includes large unrelated async/sync transport stacks

output.import: import featurelifted; from featurelifted import Headers, Request, Response, accept_key, generate_key, validate_handshake_request; from featurelifted.headers import parse_connection, parse_upgrade, parse_extension, parse_subprotocol, build_subprotocol, validate_subprotocols, parse_authorization_basic, build_authorization_basic, build_www_authenticate_basic; from featurelifted.exceptions import InvalidHeaderFormat, InvalidHeaderValue, InvalidUpgrade, InvalidHeader, InvalidOrigin, SecurityError; from featurelifted.http11 import parse_headers; from featurelifted.streams import StreamReader
